name: SOT Three-Layer Rejected Competing Shapes (Exclusion Record)

citations.evidenceRole: REJECT_DIRECT_IMPORT ledger for five retained competing shapes

claimBoundary: REJECTED_COMPETING_SHAPE. Records five retained-corpus shapes reviewed and excluded from direct import into the accepted SOT3 contract chain: Flow-embedded camelCase RefineryPacket (packetId, READY_FOR_VERIFICATION), attach-source.ts SourceAttachment/IntakeRecord, the open truth.packet.schema.json shape (additionalProperties: true), publish-gate.ts PublishGateInput.truthKernelAccepted boolean, and source-score.ts updateSourceScore() direct mutation. This entry is an exclusion record only; it does not import, implement, or grant runtime owner status to any of the five shapes.
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim any of the five rejected shapes is a CVF-owned or CVF-implemented capability; this entry exists solely to make the exclusion decision discoverable without re-scanning the retained corpus.
